commit.name: Weather Card
commit.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
commit.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

issues.description: Icon component at line 86 (weather condition emoji) lacks semantic description - should have aria-label prop describing the weather condition
issues.fix: Icon component at line 86 (weather condition emoji) lacks semantic description - should have aria-label prop describing the weather condition

issues.description: Icon components at lines 104 and 111 (droplets and wind icons) lack aria-labels - should be labeled as 'Humidity icon' and 'Wind speed icon' respectively
issues.fix: Icon components at lines 104 and 111 (droplets and wind icons) lack aria-labels - should be labeled as 'Humidity icon' and 'Wind speed icon' respectively

issues.description: Forecast day cards (line 126) lack semantic context - consider wrapping forecast items in article elements or adding aria-label to describe each forecast day
issues.fix: Forecast day cards (line 126) lack semantic context - consider wrapping forecast items in article elements or adding aria-label to describe each forecast day

issues.description: Icon at line 129 (forecast weather emoji) lacks aria-label describing the weather condition for that day
issues.fix: Icon at line 129 (forecast weather emoji) lacks aria-label describing the weather condition for that day

issues.description: Heading hierarchy uses h2 for city name (line 84) and h3 for forecast section (line 122) without an h1 context - main page content should establish clear hierarchy
issues.fix: Heading hierarchy uses h2 for city name (line 84) and h3 for forecast section (line 122) without an h1 context - main page content should establish clear hierarchy

issues.description: No aria-labels on Card components at lines 102 and 109 - these semantic data cards could benefit from aria-labels like 'Humidity details' and 'Wind speed details'
issues.fix: No aria-labels on Card components at lines 102 and 109 - these semantic data cards could benefit from aria-labels like 'Humidity details' and 'Wind speed details'

issues.description: Temperature display (line 94) uses h1 with inline styles instead of semantic labeling - should have aria-label indicating 'Current temperature'
issues.fix: Temperature display (line 94) uses h1 with inline styles instead of semantic labeling - should have aria-label indicating 'Current temperature'

issues.description: Line 92: Hardcoded fallback color '#f0f9ff' in background property — should define a proper design system variable or use only var() without fallback
issues.fix: Line 92: Hardcoded fallback color '#f0f9ff' in background property — should define a proper design system variable or use only var() without fallback

issues.description: Lines 87, 105, 106, 112, 113, 128, 133, 140: Inline color properties with hardcoded hex fallbacks (e.g., '#52525b', '#0284c7', '#18181b') bypass design system when variables are unavailable — consider using semantic token aliases or ensuring tokens exist in design system
issues.fix: Lines 87, 105, 106, 112, 113, 128, 133, 140: Inline color properties with hardcoded hex fallbacks (e.g., '#52525b', '#0284c7', '#18181b') bypass design system when variables are unavailable — consider using semantic token aliases or ensuring tokens exist in design system

issues.description: Lines 94, 102, 109, 126: Inline style objects (style={{ fontSize, fontWeight, flex, minWidth, textAlign }}) used instead of design system spacing/sizing tokens — should use props or CSS classes that reference design tokens
issues.fix: Lines 94, 102, 109, 126: Inline style objects (style={{ fontSize, fontWeight, flex, minWidth, textAlign }}) used instead of design system spacing/sizing tokens — should use props or CSS classes that reference design tokens

issues.description: Line 123: wrap attribute on Stack may not be a standard design system prop — verify this is supported or use flexWrap via style/CSS variable
issues.fix: Line 123: wrap attribute on Stack may not be a standard design system prop — verify this is supported or use flexWrap via style/CSS variable

issues.description: Line 95: Current temperature displays unit correctly with `°{props.unit}`, but unit prop is not validated as required (Props interface marks it as required, but data contract shows it as optional)
issues.fix: Line 95: Current temperature displays unit correctly with `°{props.unit}`, but unit prop is not validated as required (Props interface marks it as required, but data contract shows it as optional)

issues.description: Lines 132-133: 5-day forecast high/low temperatures display only `°` without the unit suffix — should display `{day.high}°{props.unit}` and `{day.low}°{props.unit}` to maintain consistency
issues.fix: Lines 132-133: 5-day forecast high/low temperatures display only `°` without the unit suffix — should display `{day.high}°{props.unit}` and `{day.low}°{props.unit}` to maintain consistency

issues.description: No validation or default value for optional unit prop — if unit is undefined, line 95 will display '°undefined'; recommend defaulting to 'C' when unit is not provided
issues.fix: No validation or default value for optional unit prop — if unit is undefined, line 95 will display '°undefined'; recommend defaulting to 'C' when unit is not provided

evaluation.critique: The component has good overall structure and correctly renders dynamic weather data from props without hardcoding. However, it mixes design tokens with fallback hex values inconsistently, uses inline styles for spacing/sizing instead of relying on design system tokens, and lacks interactive polish like hover states or transitions on cards. The Icon component usage appears incorrect (using emoji strings as 'name' prop).
